originalTitle: Guardiola says he enjoys watching Arsenal play
originalDescription: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says he enjoys watching Arsenal play as he can "learn a lot" from them.

originalTitle: Italy made me a manager when England 'discouraged' me - Cole
originalDescription: Ashley Cole won 107 caps for England, seventh on the all‑time list, but says he was "discouraged" by those in the football pyramid from becoming a head coach.

originalTitle: Leicester need something special to beat drop - Rowett
originalDescription: Leicester City boss Gary Rowett says "belief" in increasingly dire times will be key to the Foxes' Championship survival hopes.

originalTitle: Fernandez back to face Man Utd but Chelsea's problems remain
originalDescription: Enzo Fernandez returns for Chelsea this weekend, but questions remain.

originalTitle: Sutton's predictions v boxer Molly McCann & the Boo Radleys
originalDescription: Chris Sutton takes on boxer Molly McCann and The Boo Radley's frontman Sice Rowbottom plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this weekend's Premier League fixtures.

originalTitle: All your FPL stats and Premier League team news in one place
originalDescription: Every key bit of Premier League team news and the most important Fantasy Premier League statistics - all in one place.

originalTitle: Silva appeal against ban and fine partially upheld
originalDescription: Fulham boss Marco Silva's appeal against a one-match touchline ban and £90,000 fine is partially upheld by an independent appeal board.

originalTitle: Nobody says who called first, but Arteta and Guardiola speak again - Balague
originalDescription: As Manchester City prepare to host Arsenal in Sunday's crucial Premier League meeting between the top two, European football expert Guillem Balague looks at how the two managers have evolved.

originalTitle: 'He didn't complain when winning' - Russell on Verstappen's F1 quit threat
originalDescription: George Russell says Max Verstappen did not have the same complaints as rivals about the last era of Formula 1 cars as he “was winning” but admits he would “understand” if the four-time world champion walked away from the sport.

originalDescription: The Weekend Winners panel return to preview a big day of racing from Newbury, headlined by the Group 3 Greenham Stakes.

originalTitle: Clayton: Littler was not fazed by hostile crowd in Rotterdam
originalDescription: Jonny Clayton was impressed with the way Luke Littler was unfazed by the hostile crowd to reach the final in Rotterdam as the Welshman landed his second consecutive nightly win in the Premier League.

originalTitle: Liverpool latest: Future looks bright, says Slot

originalDescription: Cyrus Pattinson is fighting his way back from “rock bottom” as he looks to continue his career renaissance in Newcastle this Saturday.

originalTitle: Red Bull hire from Racing Bulls amid technical shake-up
originalDescription: Red Bull have announced changes to their technical department with the aim of "reinforcing its focus on performance and innovation".
